message:
feat(tui): add reusable visual primitives for TUI redesign

Add shared building blocks that return RichLine/RichSpan for composable
TUI rendering:

- status_chip(): coloured icon + abbreviated status (●open, ▶prog, etc)
- priority_badge(): coloured P0-P4 with clamping
- type_badge(): single-letter type icon (T/B/E/F/Q/D)
- metric_strip(): label + mini bar + value (e.g. "PR ██░░░░ 0.42")
- blocker_indicator(): ⊘N blocked or ↓N unblocks
- section_separator(): dim horizontal rule with max-width cap
- panel_header(): bold title with optional dim subtitle
- label_chips(): bracketed coloured label tags
- issue_scan_line(): dense single-line issue summary with all indicators

All primitives are width-safe and theme-aware via the tokens module.
12 regression tests covering all primitives including edge cases.

Addresses bd-2bpl.3.6.4.2 (visual primitives for TUI redesign).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
